champions-reg-ma.sourceNote: Champions Reg M-A meta snapshot — refresh from Pikalytics live data when offline.

cores.name: Incineroar + Sinistcha
cores.hint: A common Champions backbone — Intimidate support plus a bulky win condition. Plan Fire and Ghost answers.

cores.name: Garchomp + Sneasler
cores.hint: Fast physical pressure is common in Champions. Ice, Fairy, and priority can punish this pairing.

regulation-i.sourceNote: Curated meta snapshot for portfolio demos — update from Victory Road / official usage when preparing for a real event.

cores.name: Incineroar + Rillaboom
cores.hint: Intimidate plus Grassy Glide is a classic backbone. Your team may struggle without Fire/Grass answers or a way to pressure Incineroar.

cores.name: Pelipper rain core
cores.hint: Rain teams abuse Swift Swim and boosted Water. Consider Electric coverage and weather control.

cores.name: Torkoal sun core
cores.hint: Sun boosts Fire and weakens Water. Watch for speed under sun and opposing weather.

cores.name: Trick Room stack
cores.hint: Trick Room reverses speed. Without anti-TR (Taunt, Imprison, fast KO) or your own TR, slow teams can run over you.

cores.name: Flutter Mane + Iron Hands
cores.hint: Special + physical spread with Booster Energy. Dark, Ghost, and Steel answers are common in meta teams.

regulation-j.sourceNote: Placeholder meta for Regulation J — replace when official lists publish.

cores.name: Incineroar + Rillaboom
cores.hint: Still a defining doubles core in many formats. Plan around Intimidate cycles and Rillaboom speed control.
